title: salix × boutignyana
intro: Salix × boutignyana, also known as hybrid willow, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Salix genus and is a cross between S. viminalis and S. purpurea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Salix × boutignyana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The herbal preparations of Salix × boutignyana include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
